title: Design Underground System
coreIdea: Track passenger check-ins and check-outs across stations to compute average travel time between station pairs, using one hashmap to store in-progress trips (keyed by passenger id) and another to accumulate total time and count per station pair.
recognitionCues: asks to design a system tracking paired start/end events over time
requires maintaining running averages keyed by a combination of two entities (station pairs)
approach: On checkIn, store {passengerId: (station, time)}. On checkOut, retrieve the check-in record, compute travel time, update a hashmap keyed by (startStation, endStation) with accumulated total time and trip count, then remove the passenger's check-in record. getAverageTime simply divides total time by count for the given station pair.
